title: We Are Crowdsourcing the Panopticon
summary: A man raises his phone as police move into a crowd. The video is shaky, loud, immediate. Within minutes, it is online. Within hours, it is everywhere. This is how accountability works now. Something happens, someone records it, and that footage can show what really happened, sometimes contradicting official accounts. title: Strait of Hormuz traffic to return to normal as soon as August, Kalshi traders speculate
summary: Odds that the Strait of Hormuz traffic will return to normal before August surpassed 50%, following U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement.
